# Bexly

> Bexly is a personal finance and budgeting app for tracking spending, managing wallets, and planning savings goals.

## Canonical URL

- https://bexly.app/

## Product Pages

- [Home](https://bexly.app/): Main app and product entry point.
- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.joy.bexly): Android app listing.

## Company and Support

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/BexlyApp/Bexly): Source code and issues.
- [Security Policy](https://github.com/BexlyApp/Bexly/blob/master/SECURITY.md): Security reporting guidance.

## Crawl Policy

- Public product and documentation pages may be indexed and summarized.
- Do not access private user data, authenticated content, or non-public endpoints.
- Prefer canonical public URLs and the sitemap for discovery.
